tasks.label: enumerate-site-directories
args: cd frappe-bench/sites && for d in */; do n=${d%/}; case "$n" in assets|archived|pids) ;; *) if [ -f "$n/site_config.json" ]; then echo "$n"; fi ;; esac; done

tasks.label: drop-all-real-sites
args: cd frappe-bench && for s in crysomedia.erp.local erp.local qwerty.erp.local tenant2.erp.local tenant3.erp.local tenant4.erp.local tenant5.erp.local thoughtbins.erp.local; do echo "Dropping $s"; bench drop-site "$s" --force --root-login root --root-password root || true; done

tasks.label: verify-no-active-sites
args: cd frappe-bench/sites && for d in */; do n=${d%/}; if [ -f "$n/site_config.json" ]; then echo "$n"; fi; done

tasks.label: rebuild-bench-env-python312
args: cd frappe-bench && TS=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S) && if [ -d env ]; then mv env "env_py311_backup_${TS}"; fi && /opt/homebrew/bin/python3.12 -m venv env && ./env/bin/python -V && ./env/bin/pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel && ./env/bin/pip install -e apps/frappe -e apps/erpnext -e apps/saas_control

tasks.label: check-install-python314

args: DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS `_101cd9eca4a3b5df`; DROP USER IF EXISTS "_101cd9eca4a3b5df"@"%"; DROP USER IF EXISTS "_101cd9eca4a3b5df"@"172.21.0.1"; FLUSH PRIVILEGES;

tasks.label: recreate-central-site-noninteractive-v2
args: cd /Users/crysosancher/Documents/Cryso/Thoughtins/ERP-NEXT/frappe-bench && rm -rf sites/crysomedia.erp.local sites/crysomedia.127.0.0.1.nip.io && ./env/bin/bench new-site crysomedia.erp.local --db-host 127.0.0.1 --db-port 3307 --db-root-username root --db-root-password root --admin-password admin --mariadb-user-host-login-scope=% && ./env/bin/bench --site crysomedia.erp.local install-app erpnext && ./env/bin/bench --site crysomedia.erp.local install-app saas_control && ./env/bin/bench --site crysomedia.erp.local migrate && cd /Users/crysosancher/Documents/Cryso/Thoughtins/ERP-NEXT && ./team_setup.sh

tasks.label: validate-new-reset-script
args: cd /Users/crysosancher/Documents/Cryso/Thoughtins/ERP-NEXT && chmod +x reset_central_site.sh && bash -n reset_central_site.sh && bash -n team_setup.sh && bash -n start_all.sh && echo OK

tasks.label: kill-port-8000
args: PIDS=$(lsof -ti tcp:8000 -sTCP:LISTEN || true); if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then echo "Killing: $PIDS"; kill -9 $PIDS; else echo "No listener on 8000"; fi; echo "After:"; lsof -nP -iTCP:8000 -sTCP:LISTEN || true

tasks.label: confirm-port-8000-free
args: if lsof -nP -iTCP:8000 -sTCP:LISTEN >/tmp/p8000_check 2>&1; then echo "LISTENING"; cat /tmp/p8000_check; else echo "FREE"; fi
